title: Lance Of Longinus Sold
wikitext:
[]: Lance Of Longinus Sold             Quote Post by cannonski » Sun Apr 27, 2008 7:35 pm Seen this article: http://www.alafista.com/2007/09/08/lance-of-longinus-final-bid/ Sold for over 100k us $ apparently. I wonder if it can pierce AT Fields... On a side note has anyone seen the eva edition Ipod? http://www.techjapan.com/Article746.html Or the Eva bike (which to me is slightly taking the piss frankly lol) http://uk.gizmodo.com/2006/03/27/neon_genesis_evangelion_bike.html Note: if this article is somewhere else in here I apologise, as I gave up after using the search with the string 'longinus' and other such terms after the first couple of pages or so.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun Apr 27, 2008 7:58 pm Gainax does some world class whoring of franchises. I have seen the ipod and the bike before. I think there was a an Eva shoe too.

[]:             Quote Post by cannonski » Sun Apr 27, 2008 9:04 pm Yeah I've seen some other GAINAX related merchandise too, i think one item of it featured in a Japanese sex shop as reported elsewhere, but I will get back to you on that item lol.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun Apr 27, 2008 9:52 pm Let's hope GAINAX did not make Eva condoms lol.

[]:             Quote Post by cannonski » Sun Apr 27, 2008 9:58 pm To go off topic for a bit, reminds me of a certain article on Japanese sex shops I read up on a while back... [url]http://www.demonbaby.com/blog/2005/08/curiosities-from-japans-porno-shops.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Apr 27, 2008 10:07 pm http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3373&start=0 Is this what you're looking for? Edit: Also, moving this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sun Apr 27, 2008 11:39 pm TheAyanamiOtaku wrote: Let's hope GAINAX did not make Eva condoms lol.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon Apr 28, 2008 1:34 am One of the only reasons why I would buy a human-sized Lance of Longinus is for show. Apparently, holding the Lance while out going on a public street would make me seem like a 2-forked Devil.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 28, 2008 1:44 am That Lance isn't red, therefore it is just a crappy MPE Lance. GET ME TEH REAL LANCE OF LONGINUS. (Not the actual actual Spear of Longinus, just the Eva one.) NAO!!! But I might partake on some of the iPod stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Mon Apr 28, 2008 5:30 pm I'd spraypaint it and poke random people with it. Or pin a stuffed animal to a cross and make my mom think I've finally lost it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 28, 2008 5:42 pm Uh, based on the dates of those other pages, the Ipods and Bike hath been long sold out. Though you could possibly find one on ebay or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Fri May 02, 2008 5:52 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Uh, based on the dates of those other pages, the Ipods and Bike hath been long sold out. Though you could possibly find one on ebay or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat May 17, 2008 12:20 am Sachi_13 wrote: Not the actual actual Spear of Longinus, just the Eva one NAO!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat May 17, 2008 5:00 am ...I'd want that Lance :(

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat May 17, 2008 1:36 pm RandomStuff wrote: I'd spraypaint it and poke random people with it. Or pin a stuffed animal to a cross and make my mom think I've finally lost it.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun May 18, 2008 6:07 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Uh, based on the dates of those other pages, the Ipods and Bike hath been long sold out. Though you could possibly find one on ebay or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun May 18, 2008 7:31 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I'm betting they make tons of replicas everyday. It ain't so hard to just get a wad of plastic/metal and weld it into a shape like the Lance. But I'm just assuming they're hard to find.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun May 18, 2008 1:44 pm I got a challenge for metal workers: make a real Eva sized Lance. That would be some gratuitous fan work right there.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon May 19, 2008 1:09 am Ornette wrote: BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I'm betting they make tons of replicas everyday. It ain't so hard to just get a wad of plastic/metal and weld it into a shape like the Lance. But I'm just assuming they're hard to find.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Mon May 19, 2008 9:55 pm Iron Rooster wrote: Sachi_13 wrote: Not the actual actual Spear of Longinus, just the Eva one NAO!!!
